discipline: Art. XVII: entries are append-only. A status change is recorded by APPENDING to `revisions` (with reason/timestamp/commit) and updating `current_status`; `original_status` is never overwritten. Art. XIX: any N-count in `evidence` is not hand-derived — it carries `count_source` pointing at the generated artifact that produced it.
note: Load-bearing premises stated, verified, and pinned. Statuses: VERIFIED | FALSE | PARTIAL | UNKNOWN | STALE. A FALSE load-bearing premise blocks downstream execution and creates a correction/annotation obligation (Art. XVIII). Seeded from premises already tested across the completed programmes.

assumptions.statement: DAMOS site metadata exists and is correctly mapped to a site code per document
assumptions.evidence: site codes recovered from DAMOS heading prefix

assumptions.statement: Scribal-hand metadata is populated for Linear B documents
assumptions.verification_method: inspect DAMOS hand_easy vs vasewriter fields
assumptions.evidence: hand_easy populated; vasewriter empty — hand available but partial
assumptions.expiry_condition: use of scribe as a load-bearing grouping variable

assumptions.statement: Linear A logograms/fractions/notation are parsed from the silver stream
assumptions.expiry_condition: any LA experiment depending on fine LA notation typing

assumptions.statement: DAMOS, Ventris-Chadwick and Aura Jorro are independent sources whose agreement is corroboration
assumptions.evidence: FALSE — all descend from one decipherment lineage (SHARED_DECIPHERMENT); agreement is not independent (Art. XI)
assumptions.expiry_condition: a genuinely independent machine-readable source is acquired
assumptions.note: Premise was implicitly assumed true before the Stage-2 audit falsified it; first formal recording is FALSE. Blocks any 'independent consensus' claim across these sources.

assumptions.statement: The Linear A target corpus supports the Linear B source feature set at usable density for non-trivial semantic labels
assumptions.evidence: PARTIAL/limiting — LA is short-word, sparse; non-trivial semantic-label pool and class coverage are below power
assumptions.count_source: experiments/no_human_structure/.../source_labels/power_gate.json (generated; reports the non-trivial pool size and class coverage)
assumptions.expiry_condition: corpus expansion or a denser observable channel

assumptions.statement: Models cannot access transliteration / phonetic values (de-phoneticisation firewall holds)
assumptions.verification_method: opaque B_SIGN/A_SIGN vocabs; eval-only id<->sound keys gitignored; no-semantic-fields tests
assumptions.evidence: firewall enforced; separate LA/LB vocabs never merged
assumptions.expiry_condition: any change to graph builders or vocab handling

assumptions.statement: The evaluation split blocks lexical-/morphological-family leakage (A12)
assumptions.verification_method: unseen-family split assigns whole families to test and drops mixed-membership entries
assumptions.expiry_condition: any new experiment defining its own split

assumptions.statement: The Edel & Gorg 2005 scan contains Falttafeln 13/14 needed for full reading-independence
assumptions.verification_method: collation of the delivered scan (REQ-01 closure)
assumptions.evidence: FALSE — plates absent from the scan; reading-independence scoped in the closure note

assumptions.statement: The Tamburini CSA path is valid with processes=1 (serial)
assumptions.evidence: FALSE — serial path gives garbage; forked isolation (processes>1) mandatory
assumptions.expiry_condition: any re-run of the CSA sweep
